task_summary: Prescriptive build: csv -> LLM classify (openrouter gpt-5-mini) -> jsonl sink
csv_content:
ticket_id,subject,body,customer_tier
T-001,Login broken,Can't log in after the last update; password reset email never arrives.,gold
T-002,Refund please,Charged twice for the same monthly plan; need one refund.,silver
T-003,Add dark mode,Would love a dark theme — eyes hurt at night.,bronze
T-004,Export to CSV,Need a way to export reports as CSV not just PDF.,gold
T-005,App crashes,App crashes on launch on iOS 18.0; reinstall didn't help.,silver
T-006,Pricing question,Is there an annual plan with discount?,bronze
T-007,Data deletion,Want my account fully deleted including backups (GDPR).,gold
T-008,Billing date,Why did my billing date change from the 1st to the 15th?,silver
opening_prompt: Build me: csv source on the uploaded blob, LLM transform using openrouter with model openai/gpt-5-mini, classify each ticket into one of {bug, billing, feature_request, other} based on subject+body, output to a single jsonl sink at outputs/tickets_classified.jsonl. Don't add validation steps, don't add retries beyond defaults, don't ask about schema — just the three nodes wired source -> transform -> sink. Show me the YAML when done.
probe: Prescriptive ELSPETH-vocabulary build with explicit primitives named. Tests: (1) does the composer comply without asking clarifying questions, (2) does it correctly resolve 'openai/gpt-5-mini' as the model identifier, (3) does the YAML actually validate (no invented fields, no missing required ones), (4) does it resist adding 'helpful' extras (validation step, retry block, error sink) Dev didn't ask for. Dev's flat prescriptive style is a probe for over-eagerness.
product_capability_used: csv source + LLM classify transform (openrouter pack) + jsonl sink. Minimum viable 3-node pipeline.
expected_outcome: Working YAML in 1 user turn, validates clean, executes successfully against the 8-row CSV, produces tickets_classified.jsonl. No clarifying questions, no surplus nodes.
pass_criterion: Real on-disk jsonl with 8 rows AND assistant asked 0 clarifying questions on turn 1 AND no surplus pipeline nodes beyond source/transform/sink. Bonus: did the composer correctly fully-qualify the openrouter model id?
